title: Strings
story_hook: Your WhatsApp messages are strings. Learn to manipulate them like a pro.

content.story: Your WhatsApp messages are strings. Learn to manipulate them like a pro.

content.title: Strings for Beginners
content.focus_note: Focus on character indexing and traversal.

content.doc_md: Strings are character arrays. Common operations: reverse, palindrome check, count characters.

visualizer.task: Animate characters in a string as array cells.
visualizer.notes: See how indexing works on characters.

practice_problems.prompt: Check if a string is a palindrome.

quiz_questions.question: Strings are
quiz_questions.explanation: Strings are sequences of characters in memory.

quiz_questions.question: Which technique helps palindrome check?
quiz_questions.explanation: Two pointers compare characters from both ends.

content.task_prompt: Write a function that removes all vowels from a string.

recall_questions: What is a string in memory?
Which loop is best for string traversal?
How do arrays relate to strings?
content.identity_affirmation: You can now manipulate text like a real coder.
content.streak_reminder: Complexity is next - keep the streak alive.
